title: ranunculus tripartitus subsp. obtusiflorus
intro: Ranunculus tripartitus subsp. obtusiflorus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus tripartitus subsp. obtusiflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
